rect.style: fill: light-dark(rgb(0, 80, 239), rgb(109, 178, 255)); stroke: light-dark(rgb(0, 29, 188), rgb(178, 203, 255));

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe center; justify-content: unsafe center; width: 238px; height: 1px; padding-top: 230px; margin-left: 706px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: center; color: #ffffff;
display: inline-block; font-size: 12px; font-family: Helvetica; color: light-dark(#ffffff, #121212); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; white-space: normal; word-wrap: normal;

ellipse.style: fill: light-dark(rgb(96, 169, 23), rgb(74, 137, 12)); stroke: light-dark(rgb(45, 118, 0), rgb(115, 177, 76));

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe center; justify-content: unsafe center; width: 38px; height: 1px; padding-top: 330px; margin-left: 36px;
